title: Local packaging contract and Go WebP thumbnail planning

local_packaging_contract.frontend_dist: bundled or copied frontend/dist for local smoke only

data_dir.production_db_rule: local artifact smoke must use a copied DB/data dir unless a later explicit production rollout gate approves live data use

migration_owner.go_allowed: status-only local/readiness candidate with SQLite query_only

local_packaging_contract.release_boundary: local packaging success does not update Pi, Caddy, systemd, or production routing

thumbnail_webp_plan.current_owner: Python upload/import thumbnail generation through optional Pillow

current_contract.thumbnail_only_behavior: when thumbnail generation succeeds, thumbnail_only returns the WebP thumbnail URL and does not keep the original upload

thumbnail_webp_plan.planned_go_owner: future Go image thumbnail candidate, not implemented in 23.8.1

must_verify: WebP encode support, not decode-only support
jpeg/png/webp/gif input handling or explicit retained-Python fallback for unsupported inputs

allowed_only_after: Go encoder dependency decision is complete
thumbnail parity fixtures cover upload, upload/url, and import helper behavior
path and deletion cleanup still find _thumb.webp
requirements.txt, scripts/start.bat, docs/API_REFERENCE.md, and docs/SEQUENCE-UPLOAD.md are updated together
Python fallback or removal decision is explicit

blocked_scope: Remove PIL imports from Python routes
Add a Go WebP encoder dependency
Implement Go upload or thumbnail routes

allowed_next_steps.title: Local smoke artifact
allowed_next_steps.summary: Build and smoke a local artifact against a copied data dir: startup, bundled frontend dist, health/read/write candidate routes, DB query_only/default boundaries, and no production data mutation.

allowed_next_steps.title: Go WebP encoder dependency decision
allowed_next_steps.summary: Evaluate and select a WebP encoder candidate only after proving encode support, Windows/Pi arm64 build behavior, license, cgo status, and input-format coverage.
